# Load the provided text file to ensure we use exact characters and compute indices
path = "/mnt/data/file-XECdzHeLu13EzzAGLj7STq-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
text, len(text)[:200]

text_repr = repr(text)
text_first_500 = text[:500]
text, text_repr[:300], len(text)

# Let's find all occurrences of double quote '"' in the text and print positions and contexts
indices = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(indices), indices[:20]

segments = []
for i in range(0, len(indices), 2):
    start_q = indices[i]
    end_q = indices[i+1]
    seg = text[start_q+1:end_q]
    segments.append((start_q, end_q, seg))
segments

# Verify each computed span maps to the segment exactly
spans = []
for start_q, end_q, seg in segments:
    span_start = start_q + 1
    span_end = end_q
    extracted = text[span_start:span_end]
    spans.append((span_start, span_end, extracted, seg, extracted == seg))
spans

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":113,"span_end":267,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ نَفْسٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًا كَثِيرًا وَنِسَاءً","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":326,"span_end":409,"span_text":"إِنْ يَكُونُوا فُقَرَاءَ يُغْنِهِمُ اللَّـهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ وَاللَّهُ وَاسِعٌ عَلِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":467,"span_end":516,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِلرِّجَالِ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجُوا الأرْبَعَةَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":749,"span_end":953,"span_text":"وَلَنْ تَسْتَطِيعُوا أَنْ تَعْدِلُوا بَيْنَ النِّسَاءِ وَلَوْ حَرَصْتُمْ فَلَا تَمِيلُوا كُلَّ الْمَيْلِ فَتَذَرُوهَا كَالْمُعَلَّقَةِ وَإِنْ تُصْلِحُوا وَتَتَّقُوا فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
